title: The Master Herbalist Sandalwood Scented Wardrobe Freshener Sachet in a William Morris Design in Black | Pack of 2
features: Pack of Two: The Master Herbalist's SANDALWOOD Hanging Wardrobe Freshener or Drawer Sachet to complement our Traditional Scented Drawer Liners. It comes with an integrated retractable hook so you can hang it in your wardrobe or lay it in a drawer or cupboard.

New Fragrance including Sandalwood Essential Oils: SANDALWOOD is a classic and timeless fragrance. With a soft, earthy, warm, smooth, creamy and woody scent, it has very popular aromatic notes and is perfect for household drawers and cupboards.
Each Wardrobe Freshener measures 16 cm x 10 cm (approx 6" x 4").

LONG LASTING NATURAL FRAGRANCE: Our fragrances are MADE IN BRITAIN to the highest standards. Allergen free, they are formulations designed to last whilst imparting a gentle fragrance over time. PERFUME will be strong on opening but relax in the first few hours. We recommend you unpack and leave for an hour or so for the fragrance to soften.
SUSTAINABLE & MADE IN THE UK. FSC approved paper, Recyclable Outer Box and Paper Sheets. MANUFACTURED AND SOLD FROM Suffolk, England.
description: Product description The Master Herbalist's Hanging Wardrobe Freshener or Drawer Sachet to complement our Traditional Scented Drawer Liners. This SANDALWOOD Wardrobe Freshener has a delicate warming SANDALWOOD fragrance and comes with an integrated retractable hook so you can hang it in your wardrobe or lay it in a drawer or cupboard. The design is a floral WILLIAM MORRIS print in BLACK. Each Wardrobe Freshener is made from scented paper and contains a fragranced mineral pouch. It is then gently scented with our SANDALWOOD fragrance, ideal for keeping your wardrobes and cupboards smelling fresh and adding some colour. ALL PROUDLY MADE IN THE UK.SANDALWOOD is a classic and timeless fragrance. With a soft, earthy, warm, smooth, creamy and woody scent, it has very popular aromatic notes and is perfect for household drawers and cupboards. Safety Warning May cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Dispose of in regular household waste.
